title: The Dialogue Police (EADF2026)
synopsis:
Demonstrations. Quran burnings. Climate actions. At the eye of the storm stands a dedicated unit of Swedish police officers tasked with a vital mission: safeguarding everyone’s right to free speech. In a deeply polarized society where conflicts threaten to tear communities apart, this motley crew of strong-willed individuals navigates tense frontlines with humour and profound humanism. United by a shared calling, these officers risk it all to protect democracy, proving that dialogue remains our most powerful weapon against repression.

 

CPH:DOX
Best Editing, Guldbagge Awards

synopsis_lang.en:
Demonstrations. Quran burnings. Climate actions. At the eye of the storm stands a dedicated unit of Swedish police officers tasked with a vital mission: safeguarding everyone’s right to free speech. In a deeply polarized society where conflicts threaten to tear communities apart, this motley crew of strong-willed individuals navigates tense frontlines with humour and profound humanism. United by a shared calling, these officers risk it all to protect democracy, proving that dialogue remains our most powerful weapon against repression.

 

CPH:DOX
Best Editing, Guldbagge Awards
synopsis_lang.zh_hk:
瑞典有一支不靠槍和手銬，唯一武器是「講道理」的特殊警隊。這隊警察講數隊的任務不是逮捕和鎮壓，而是傾聽，遊走於火爆的示威街頭，充當示威者與體制之間的橋樑，用對話阻止暴力升級。電影深入警隊訓練過程、實際執勤的拉鋸現場，甚至記錄了他們與家人、同事之間的反思和對話。在立場非黑即白、網絡公審盛行的今天，再三思考一個最無奈的時代命題：當所有人都走往極端，「坐低慢慢傾」到底是一底情願的民主童話，抑或真正守護自由的力量？

 

哥本哈根國際紀錄片電影節
瑞典金甲蟲獎 最佳剪接

subtitle: English
